title: AEM foundation path
summary: Core AEM — architecture through building components.

steps.title: AEM architecture fundamentals
steps.description: Understand how AEM Author and Publish work, where content is stored in JCR, and how content moves between environments.

steps.title: Sling, HTL, and component development
steps.description: Sling Models, HTL, extending Core Components.

steps.title: Dispatcher and caching
steps.description: Learn the basic Dispatcher filter and cache rules, how cache invalidation works, and how to debug common caching issues.

title: Cloud Service & Edge path
summary: AEM Cloud, Cloud Manager, headless, GraphQL, and Edge Delivery.

steps.title: AEM as a Cloud Service & pipelines
steps.description: Cloud Manager, RDE, code analyser, release cadence.

steps.title: Headless content & GraphQL
steps.description: Content Fragment models and persisted queries.

title: Experience Platform path
summary: Hook AEM up to Analytics, Target, and customer data when you need personalization.

steps.title: Analytics & Target with AEM
steps.description: Tags, goals, A/B tests on AEM pages.

steps.title: Personalization at scale
steps.description: Content Fragments with segments; keep performance in mind.
